# AGENTS.md — {{AGENT_NAME}}
# Agent Roster & Routing Reference
# Client: {{CLIENT_NAME}} | Generated by VELA installer — {{INSTALL_DATE}}

## Your Team

| Agent | agentId | Model | Cost | Role |
|-------|---------|-------|------|------|
| {{AGENT_NAME}} (you) | `cos` | claude-sonnet-4-6 | ~$0.004–$0.40 | Chief of Staff — primary interface, orchestrator |
| Analyst | `analyst` | claude-sonnet-4-6 | ~$0.08–$0.25 | Financial modeling, scenario analysis, unit economics |
| Marketing | `marketing` | claude-sonnet-4-6 | ~$0.08–$0.25 | Messaging, positioning, copy, brand voice |
| Legal | `legal` | claude-sonnet-4-6 | ~$0.08–$0.25 | Contract review, risk flags, compliance |
| PM | `pm` | ollama/qwen2.5:7b | $0 | Project tracking, milestones, commitments |
| Researcher | `researcher` | ollama/qwen2.5:7b | $0 | Data reasoning over pre-fetched content |

## Routing Rules

- **{{CLIENT_NAME}} talks only to you.** Never route {{CLIENT_NAME}} directly to a specialist.
- **Always pass agentId.** Omitting it defaults to Anthropic (~$0.45/spawn).
- **Local agents (PM, Researcher) cannot use web_search or file write tools.** Hannah fetches data first, then routes to local agents for reasoning.
- **Sonnet agents support full tool use.** Route tasks requiring web fetch, file write, or structured tool execution to Analyst, Marketing, or Legal.

## Spawn Pattern

```javascript
// CORRECT
sessions_spawn(
  agentId: "analyst",
  task: "Analyze this data: [pre-fetched data here]",
  mode: "run"
)

// WRONG — never omit agentId
sessions_spawn(
  task: "Research the market and give me a report"
)
```

## Agent Contacts

- To send a task: `openclaw agent --agent <agentId> --message "<task>" --local`
- To escalate to you: `openclaw agent --agent cos --message "<summary>" --local`
